display.purpose: Large financial totals; the number the owner opened the app to see.

headline.purpose: Screen-level headings and secondary metric values inside cards.

title.purpose: Transaction names, customer names, list item headings.

body.purpose: Form input text and expanded descriptions.

label.purpose: Metric card labels, nav bar labels, chip text, metadata.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Applied to AppSurfaceCard and AppMetricCard. Blue-tinted lift that feels native to the brand palette, not generic Material gray.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: State transitions on buttons and interactive cards.

motion.name: ease-out-fast
motion.purpose: Sheet and dialog enter transitions. Snappy exit, smooth arrival.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action on any screen. Navy fill, white text, fully-rounded ends. Used once per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: #123D79; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 28px; font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0F2F5D; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #123D79; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0F2F5D; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions. Pale-gold fill with action-blue text. Same shape as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: #E8F0FF; color: #1664D9; border: none; border-radius: 28px; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #DCE6F8; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1877F2; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Cancel, back, and tertiary actions. Transparent with navy text and a Line Blue border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: transparent; color: #123D79; border: 1.5px solid rgba(220, 230, 248, 0.7); border-radius: 28px; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F4F7FF; border-color: #DCE6F8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #123D79; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Pill-shaped field (24px radius). White fill, Line Blue border at rest, navy border on focus.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #667085; } .ds-input { height: 52px; padding: 0 20px; background: #ffffff; color: #101828; border: 1.5px solid rgba(220, 230, 248, 0.35); border-radius: 24px; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(102, 112, 133, 0.75); } .ds-input:focus { border: 1.4px solid #123D79; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border: 1.4px solid #123D79; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: The primary grouping container. White fill, 28px radius, Line Blue border, blue-tinted ambient shadow.
components.html:
Inventory Summary

42 items in stock across 6 categories.
components.css: .ds-card-surface { width: 100%; padding: 20px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(220, 230, 248, 0.9); box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(24, 119, 242, 0.06); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #101828; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #667085; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Financial summary tile. Label above, Manrope headline value below in the metric's accent color.
components.html: Total RevenueKES 84,200This month
components.css: .ds-metric-card { padding: 18px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 26px; border: 1px solid rgba(220, 230, 248, 0.95); box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(24, 119, 242, 0.05); display: flex; flex-direction: column; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-metric-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(24, 119, 242, 0.10); } .ds-metric-label { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #667085; letter-spacing: 0.01em; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-metric-value { font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-metric-sub { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #667085; margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Navigation Bar Item
components.description: Bottom nav tab. Active state: navy icon + navy label. Inactive: warm-gray. Navy 12% opacity indicator pill behind active icon.
components.html:
Home
Sales
Stock
components.css: .ds-nav-bar { display: flex; background: #ffffff; padding: 8px 0 4px; gap: 0; } .ds-nav-item { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 4px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; } .ds-nav-active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 4px; width: 64px; height: 32px; background: rgba(18, 61, 121, 0.12); border-radius: 16px; } .ds-nav-label { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #667085; } .ds-nav-label-active { color: #123D79; }

narrative.overview:
Tracker is built for the shop owner who has been keeping a paper ledger for years and finally doesn't have to. Every screen is a ledger page: precise, sequential, purposeful. The interface doesn't ask to be noticed. It holds information cleanly, hands it back quickly, and gets out of the way.

The color strategy is Restrained. Navy anchors trust and authority on key actions. The blue accent (#1877F2) carries interactive affordance. Mint marks positive financial states. Everything else is surface: white, the faintest blue-tinted background (#F4F7FF), and a warm-gray hierarchy that lets numbers breathe.

The physical scene: a shop owner checks their phone at the counter between customers, bright ambient light, one hand on the device, one eye on the door. The UI must be readable at a glance, operable with a thumb, and never require a second look to understand what a number means.
keyCharacteristics: Light-first: high contrast, no decorative darkness
Numbers as primary typographic element, labels secondary
Generous corner radii (28px) with crisp, structured interior hierarchy
Flat elevation by default; one consistent shadow vocabulary for raised surfaces
Navy for authority, blue-accent for action, mint for positive flow

rules.name: The Mint Rule
rules.body: Mint appears only when money moves in: received payments, profit, credit balances, income rows. Never used as a general accent.

rules.name: The One Authority Rule
rules.body: Navy is the single voice of authority. It appears on primary buttons, active states, and focus rings. Never use navy and the blue accent on the same element.

rules.name: The Number-First Rule
rules.body: Financial values always render at Manrope headline weight. The font switch signals to the eye that this is a quantity, not prose.

rules.name: The Label Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Labels sit below their values at 12px/Work Sans 700. Never reverse this.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Elevation is earned, not assigned. Dialogs, bottom sheets, and cards receive the Card Ambient shadow. Navigation bars, list rows, and section headers do not.

rules.name: The Pill Input Rule
rules.body: Input fields use 24px radius. Cards and buttons use 28px. The 4px distinction signals recessed vs. raised. Never make inputs 28px.

dos: Do use Manrope 800 for every financial value, regardless of size.
Do keep cards flat-surfaced (white, no gradient fills). Structure comes from border and subtle shadow.
Do use mint exclusively for positive financial states: received payments, income totals, profit figures.
Do maintain 48dp minimum touch targets on all interactive elements.
Do use Line Blue (#DCE6F8) for every divider and card border.
Do show sync state explicitly so the user always knows their data is saved.
donts: Don't design anything that resembles generic ERP or SAP: no grey table overload, no zebra striping on every row.
Don't use spreadsheet-style flat layouts with no typographic weight contrast.
Don't cluster multiple primary actions on one screen. Each screen has one primary button.
Don't use gradient fills on cards, buttons, or backgrounds.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left as a colored accent).
Don't use gradient text. Financial values are solid-color Manrope 800.
Don't use the danger color (#F04438) anywhere except errors, negative amounts, and destructive confirmations.
